generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData, LiDARObjectTracks
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing RGB-D data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraRGBDData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor monitoring ego vehicle speed in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor monitoring ego vehicle steering angle in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data stream transmitted via ROS2 topics over Wi-Fi network."
]

instance CameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "RGB-D data stream transmitted via ROS2 topics over Wi-Fi network."
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Real-time speed data stream transmitted via ROS2 topics over Wi-Fi network."
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data stream transmitted via ROS2 topics over Wi-Fi network."
]

instance LiDARObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Processed object tracks derived from LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering model using DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR data segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Object tracking model implementing Kalman filter for state estimation of detected objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model following ISO 15622 performance class I for speed adaptation based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured 3D point cloud data model for inter-component communication via ROS2 messages."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraRGBDDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured RGB-D data model for inter-component communication via ROS2 messages."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraRGBDData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured vehicle state data model combining speed and steering angle for inter-component communication via ROS2 messages."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object track data model combining LiDAR and camera-derived tracks for inter-component communication via ROS2 messages."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseSchema : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database schema for long-term storage of ego vehicle state and object track time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for modular software integration and inter-process communication across all entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, DataCollectionService, DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware programming and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for rapid prototyping of digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for ROS2 node lifecycle management and performance-critical components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, ACCControlEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling and simulation of point cloud processing algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Functional Entity for message serialization, type alignment, and unit conversion between physical and digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking Functional Entity running on Jetson Orin Nano for real-time LiDAR data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object Tracking Functional Entity implementing Kalman filtering for state estimation of detected objects."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control Functional Entity implementing ISO 15622 compliant speed adaptation logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity controlling motor and steering servo commands via ROS2 nodes."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalActuationService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity aggregating real-time data streams from physical twin sensors."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Storage component interfacing with external SQL database for persistent storage of time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data translation service handling message serialization, type alignment, and unit conversion for inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi network using UDP/TCP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data collection service aggregating real-time data streams from physical twin sensors into the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service displaying ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling ACC enabling/disabling, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation service creating human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance PhysicalActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physical actuation service converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands and controlling steering angle via ROS2 nodes."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorActuationAction, SteeringActuationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensured data consistency and compatibility between physical and digital twin entities through proper message serialization and unit conversion."
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time sensor data streams from physical twin into unified state representation for digital twin processing."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provided real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for situational awareness."
]

instance RemoteControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enabled remote adjustment of ACC parameters and system state through user interface controls."
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated comprehensive time-series reports of vehicle state and object tracks for post-analysis and compliance documentation."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiates emergency braking when critical safety conditions are detected through remote management interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SteeringActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering angle based on commands from the Digital Twin System."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle propulsion."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlling vehicle steering angle based on commands from the Digital Twin System."
]

// C1: Components
instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting Physical Twin Entity components including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking and Actuation Functional Entities."
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna providing wireless communication interface for the physical twin."
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modified Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle chassis serving as physical platform with lower-level handling steering and speed control."
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting autonomy-enabling hardware including Jetson Orin Nano, LiDAR, and camera sensors."
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on separate hardware (cloud/edge server) hosting ACC Controlling FE, Data Collection FE, and Reporting FE."
]

instance UserInterfaceDevice : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User-facing device (laptop/remote server) hosting 3D Visualization and Control Panel Functional Entities."
]

// C16: Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the autonomous vehicle and its sensing/acting components."
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis, UpperLevelChassis, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna,
                 HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor,
                 VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital environment containing the Digital Twin Entity and its processing components."
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, ACCControlEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler, DataStorageEnabler
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User interface environment containing visualization and control components."
    base:contains UserInterfaceDevice, DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
    - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** and sent back to the PT for actuation.
    - **Remote management commands** (e.g., **enable/disable ACC**, **modify desired speed**, **emergency braking**) transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** and executed by the **Actuation FE** on the PT.
    - **Actuation commands** for motor and steering servo, processed by the **Actuation FE** and executed via ROS2 nodes on the **Jetson Orin Nano** microcomputer."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with:
    - **Real-time synchronization** between PT and DT, with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
    - **Clock synchronization** between components with an **accuracy of 100 ms** (due to hardware limitations), ensuring event ordering and data integrity for distributed operations.
    - **Perception cycles** for object tracking (e.g., **LiDAR point cloud clustering** and **Kalman filtering**) aligned with the **ACC control loop** for adaptive speed computation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows the **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)** with adaptations:
    - **Entities**:
      - **Physical Twin Entity** (custom, not in ISO 23247): Hosts PT-specific functionalities (e.g., **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking**, **Actuation**).
      - **Digital Twin Entity**: Implements **ACC Controlling FE**, **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Presentation FE**.
      - **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** (sub-components of the **User Interface FE**).
    - **Deployment**: Components are distributed across **Jetson Orin Nano** (PT), **cloud/edge server** (DT), and **user device** (UI), connected via **ROS2 (local)** and **Wi-Fi (remote)** networks.
    - **Data Flow**: Sensor data propagates from **Physical Twin Entity** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity**, with bidirectional control commands."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is primarily used during the **operation phase** of the vehicle's lifecycle, focusing on:
    - **Real-time monitoring and control** of the ACC system.
    - **Remote management** for development, testing, and operational adjustments.
    The DT is **not explicitly used for design or manufacturing phases** in this case study, though it could theoretically support **cyber-physical experimentation** (e.g., via MATLAB/Simulink simulations) during development. The PT represents the **as-operated** state of the vehicle, with the DT providing a **real-time digital reflection** for optimization and safety-critical interventions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Latency Constraints**: **100 ms end-to-end latency** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**) for real-time operation.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: **100 ms accuracy** for distributed event ordering.
    - **Algorithmic Validation**:
      - **DBSCAN and Kalman Filter**: Used for object tracking with no explicit validation metrics provided.
      - **ACC Logic**: Compliant with **ISO 15622** (performance class I).
    - **Data Integrity**: Achieved via **ROS2 middleware** and **Data Translation FE** for consistent message formatting.
    - **Safety-Critical Design**: Adheres to **ISO 15622** for ACC control, with **emergency braking** prioritized in the **Actuation FE** (implied by remote management requirements)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Local Communication**: **ROS2** (DDS protocol) for intra-vehicle component communication.
    - **Remote Communication**: **Wi-Fi network** (UDP/TCP) for inter-entity data exchange, with **Data Translation FE** handling serialization.
    - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185) enforced via **clock synchronization** and **optimized data pipelines**.
    - **Network Protocols**: **UDP** for real-time data streams, **TCP** for reliable control commands."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** within the PT, running **ROS2 nodes** for sensor data processing and actuation.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on a **separate hardware component** (e.g., cloud or edge server) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Hosted on a **user-facing device** (e.g., laptop) for real-time visualization and remote management.
    - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** for long-term storage of vehicle state and object track data."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
    - **Standardized Communication Interfaces**: Adheres to **R1 (ISO 23247-inspired)** for modularity and loose coupling between components.
    - **External Data Systems**: Implicitly supports **SQL database querying** for post-processing, though no explicit integration with **vehicle telematics** or **fleet management** systems is described in the case study.
    The document does not detail integration with other DTs or external systems beyond the defined scope."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference architecture for DT development, with adaptations for automotive use (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
    - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)** performance requirements (performance class I implemented).
    - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** latency requirements (≤100 ms).
    - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular software integration.
    - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Potential for **Data Translation FE** implementation (though not explicitly used in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
    - **Safety-Critical Design**:
      - **100 ms latency constraint** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**) ensures real-time operation.
      - **ISO 15622 compliance** for ACC control logic.
      - **Clock synchronization (100 ms accuracy)** for distributed coordination.
    - **Remote Operation Safety**:
      - **Emergency braking** is prioritized in the **Actuation FE** for critical interventions.
      - **Remote management** (enable/disable ACC, speed adjustments) is designed for **human-in-the-loop** operation.
    The document does not explicitly mention **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., authentication, encryption) for Wi-Fi communication, though the **safety-critical nature** of the system implies the need for secure channels."
]
